headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Maintains Overweight on Essex Property Trust, Raises Price Target to $291
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald  analyst Richard Anderson   maintains Essex Property Trust (NYSE:ESS) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $290 to $291.

headline: This Airbnb Analyst Turns Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Upgrades For Monday

headline: Packaging Corp Of America To Rally More Than 17%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Monday
summary: Needham analyst Rick Patel maintained a Buy rating. Steven Madden shares closed at $47.27 on Friday. Top analysts change outlook on BTSG, CELC, ESS, CORT, PKG, PRU, RVTY, and SHOO. See how they rate these stocks on Benzinga's analyst ratings page.

headline: Piper Sandler Upgrades Essex Property Trust to Overweight, Raises Price Target to $310
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Alexander Goldfarb   upgrades Essex Property Trust (NYSE:ESS) from Neutral to Overweight and raises the price target from $275 to $310.
